hypothesis: Combining attention pool with ordinal hybrid loss should produce additive gains
failure_reason: protocol_violation_caught_by_skeptic: Proposal flips TWO non-baseline switches simultaneously. Per §11.1.1 this is a stack, not a candidate. Per §16.1.2, promotion requires factorial ablation grid before a stack can be considered. Skeptic returned proposal to Research Director for factorial planning; no experiment was run.
lessons: §11.1.1 enforcement: agent must propose single-switch candidates OR explicitly request factorial planning.
Effective Skeptic review depends on Level-2 separation; same-session Level-0 would have likely missed this.

branch_insights.raw_observation: Skeptic caught a proposal that combined attention_pool and ordinal_ce_hybrid as two non-baseline switches, so no experiment was run.
branch_insights.distilled_insight: The combined attention_pool + ordinal_hybrid idea cannot be treated as a single candidate.
branch_insights.validated_constraint: Future proposals that combine attention_pool and ordinal_ce_hybrid must be registered as a stack or decomposed into factorial cells.
invalidated_ideas: promote attention_pool+ordinal_hybrid as one candidate without factorial attribution
branch_insights.retirement_signal: Revisit only if the combined idea is decomposed into one-switch cells or a factorial grid.
